name: clauderaycastextension
title: Ask Claude Desktop
description: Type a prompt in Raycast, press Tab, and it opens the Claude desktop app, pastes your prompt, and submits it.
author: ahmedkhilji99

commands.name: ask-claude
commands.title: Ask Claude
commands.subtitle: Claude Desktop
commands.description: Opens Claude Desktop, pastes your prompt, and submits it.

preferences.name: autoSubmit
preferences.title: Behavior
preferences.label: Submit automatically (Enter)
preferences.description: Presses Enter so Claude starts answering immediately. Turn off to review the prompt in the chat before sending.

preferences.name: preserveClipboard
preferences.label: Restore previous clipboard text afterwards
preferences.description: Puts your old clipboard text back once the prompt has been delivered.

preferences.name: submitDelay
preferences.title: Submit Delay (ms)
preferences.description: How long to wait for the chat to open before pressing Enter. Raise it if a cold start sometimes opens the chat without sending.

preferences.name: macAppName
preferences.title: App Name (macOS)
preferences.description: The macOS application name of the Claude desktop app.
